canonical_appearance.summary: Circuit is a bipedal robot with a large, spherical white head and a slender, articulated body. Its design features a prominent, single, glowing yellow eye on the front of its head, with a secondary sensor port on the side. The robot's body is constructed from white and black panels with visible orange wiring and rivets, and it has a distinctive asymmetry where one arm is raised while the other hangs down.

front: Does the robot stand facing forward with a large, white, spherical head dominating the frame?
Is a single, large, circular, glowing yellow eye positioned on its face?
Is the body slender with a white torso and black jointed limbs?
Is the left arm raised while the right arm hangs down, showing the distinctive asymmetry?
Are the hands multi-fingered and black and white, and the legs straight with white and black joints?
Are orange lights visible on the torso, arms, and legs, and are the feet flat and white with black claws?
side: Is the robot's asymmetrical posture clearly visible from the side profile?
Is the left arm raised high and bent at the elbow, while the right arm hangs down?
Is the large, spherical head tilted slightly with the single glowing yellow eye clearly visible?
Is the body slender with a white torso and black joints?
Are the legs straight and the feet flat?
Is the robot's back visible, showing white and black paneling and orange lights on the limbs?
back: Is the large, spherical white head clearly visible from behind?
Does the head feature a central seam and a small, circular, glowing yellow light on the right side?
Is the back of the torso visible, showing white and black paneling and orange lights on the limbs?
Are the arms positioned behind the body, with the left arm slightly raised and the right arm hanging down?
Are the legs straight and the feet flat?
Does the overall design maintain the sleek and futuristic appearance with contrast between white body and black joints?

Signature: Does Circuit move with a smooth, gliding motion as described?
